name: AWS Config not enabled
description: AWS Config is not enabled. Without Config, there is no continuous compliance evaluation, configuration change tracking, or drift detection — making it impossible to demonstrate compliance or investigate configuration-related incidents.
remediation: Enable AWS Config in all regions with a recording group that covers all resource types. Set up a delivery channel to an encrypted S3 bucket with Object Lock. Enable managed Config rules for CIS controls. Consider AWS Control Tower for organisation-wide Config enablement.
